name: Carrot Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
3. In a large bowl, beat eggs lightly; add brown sugar, vegetable oil, carrots, buttermilk, bran, vanilla, currants, and salt until combined.
4. Fill the prepared muffin cups about 2/3 full with batter.
5. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the muffins pull away from the sides of the pan.
6. Makes 12-14 muffins.
